generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/dtdf/vocab#
instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers handling 4A current"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "12V/24V fan controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers"
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller"
]

instance PCBAssembly : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for current handling"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "12V/24V power supply"
]

instance StyrofoamContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03 m³ volume"
]

instance IncubatorInternalTempSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring internal temperature",
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance IncubatorInternalTempSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring internal temperature",
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance AmbientTempSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring external ambient temperature",
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureStateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "State estimation of temperature distribution for optimal control"
]

instance ModelPredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted thermal behavior for control decisions"
]

instance AdjustHeatingDurationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting heating duration (H) in bang-bang controller",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustWaitingDurationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting waiting duration (C) in bang-bang controller",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of system faults based on model outputs"
]

instance SupervisoryControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Supervisory control decisions for system safety and efficiency"
]

instance ModelCalibrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated model parameters for accurate thermal predictions"
]

instance ThermalSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation and prediction of thermal behavior using calibrated models",
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelPredictionInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring for safety and optimal operation",
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureStateEstimationInsight, FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation for temperature distribution",
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureStateEstimationInsight
]

instance ControlParameterOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of control parameters",
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustHeatingDurationAction, AdjustWaitingDurationAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection algorithms based on model outputs",
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Supervisory control algorithms based on model outputs",
    DTDFVocab:provides SupervisoryControlInsight
]

instance ModelCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model parameter calibration using Scipy optimization",
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelCalibrationInsight
]

instance ScipyCalibrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy for non-linear least squares optimization in model parameter calibration",
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for communication between components",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, ThermalSimulationService
]

instance OneWireProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire protocol for sensor communication with Raspberry Pi",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance PCBDesignEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "PCB design with MOSFETs and optocouplers for current handling and signal isolation",
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlParameterOptimizationService
]

instance INTOCPSOpenSource : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open-source software from INTO-CPS-Association repository for system integration",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, ThermalSimulationService
]

instance RaspberryPiControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B hardware controller enabling system operations",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, ThermalSimulationService
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IncubatorInternalTempSensor1, IncubatorInternalTempSensor2, AmbientTempSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements from DS18S20 sensors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationEnabler, RabbitMQBroker
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model with parameters C_air and G_box for predicting temperature dynamics",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationEnabler
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model with parameters C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box for predicting temperature dynamics",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationEnabler
]

instance ThermalIncubatorPT : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains Heatbed, Fan, RaspberryPiController, PCBAssembly, PowerSupply, StyrofoamContainer, IncubatorInternalTempSensor1, IncubatorInternalTempSensor2, AmbientTempSensor
]

instance SystemUnderStudy : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment ThermalIncubatorPT
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Commands generated by the controller (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed adjustments) are sent via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which executes them on the physical actuators. The driver ensures safe execution through protocol checks before actuation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation integrates the PT (heatbed, fan, sensors), RabbitMQ server (hosted on Raspberry Pi), low-level driver, controller, and thermal models. Information flows from PT sensors to RabbitMQ, then to DT components for processing, with commands flowing back to PT actuators via RabbitMQ."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT is integrated during the 'as operated' lifecycle phase, where it continuously monitors and simulates the physical system after deployment. Models developed during design are retained and updated with operational data to maintain relevance."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity was validated by comparing simulated temperature trajectories with experimental data. Assumptions (e.g., uniform temperature distribution) were tested via multi-sensor experiments, with residual error minimized through least-squares calibration. Uncertainty was addressed by parameter optimization to reduce prediction errors."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication uses RabbitMQ as a message broker for data exchange between PT components and DT. Sensor data is transmitted via 1-Wire bus to Raspberry Pi, with control commands routed through RabbitMQ queues between controller and low-level driver."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed on-premises on a Raspberry Pi 4 Model B, hosting the RabbitMQ server, controller software, low-level driver, and model execution environment. All components run locally on the Raspberry Pi without cloud dependency."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "A safe protocol is incorporated into the low-level driver to ensure device safety during actuation. The controller uses upper/lower temperature limits (UL, LL) to prevent unsafe conditions, though specific cybersecurity measures are not detailed in the document."
]
